Análise de Correspondencia

Guilherme Henrique Hispagol Bicho

2026-03-14

###############################################
## 0) Pacotes
############################################################
#install.packages("devtools")  # se ainda não tiver
#devtools::install_github("mortenarendt/data4consumerscience")
library(data4consumerscience)
library(dplyr)
library(kableExtra)
# install.packages(c("FactoMineR", "factoextra"))
library(FactoMineR)
library(factoextra)

############################################################
# 1) Carregar dados
############################################################
library(data4consumerscience)
library(ca)
data("beercata")
# Ver a documentação
help("beercata")
## Nenhuma documentação para 'beercata' nos pacotes e bibliotecas especificados:
## você poderia tentar '??beercata'
??beercata
## No vignettes or demos or help files found with alias or concept or
## title matching 'beercata' using fuzzy matching.
# Identificar atributos (tudo menos Beer e Consumer)
atributos <- names(beercata)[-(1:2)]

###############################################
## 1) Criar tabela de contingência Beer x Atributos
###############################################
tabela_cata <- aggregate(
  beercata[atributos],
  by = list(Beer = beercata$Beer),
  FUN = sum
)

rownames(tabela_cata) <- tabela_cata$Beer
tabela_cata$Beer <- NULL

tabela <- as.matrix(tabela_cata)

###############################################
## 2) Tabela de frequências absolutas
###############################################
N <- tabela
N
##               S_Flowers S_Beans S_Intense berries S_Caramel S_Nuts
## Brown Ale             4      54                14        52     26
## NY Lager             46      10                17        16      9
## Porse Bock           27       2                21         7     12
## Ravnsborg Red        17      25                15        35     25
## River Beer           22      12                15         3     14
## Wheat IPA            45       9                17         9      9
##               S_Savoury spices S_Dessert spices S_Regional spices S_Herbs
## Brown Ale                   13               13                13      20
## NY Lager                    22               20                26      21
## Porse Bock                   6               16                25      24
## Ravnsborg Red               19               19                20      23
## River Beer                  14                8                20      13
## Wheat IPA                   27               24                16      26
##               S_Citrus fruit S_Berries S_Fruit S_Dried fruit S_Liquor S_Bitter
## Brown Ale                 10         6      11            21       26       63
## NY Lager                  30         5      15             6       10       69
## Porse Bock                34         5       8             6        9       67
## Ravnsborg Red             11         6      11            14        9       71
## River Beer                29         4      18             4       11       65
## Wheat IPA                 30         9      21             6        2       57
##               S_Sparkling S_Refreshing S_Fruity S_Aromatic S_Pungent S_Still
## Brown Ale              20           25       22         57        18      21
## NY Lager               17           38       45         37        20      18
## Porse Bock             39           56       22         20        20      17
## Ravnsborg Red          24           51       26         52        17      23
## River Beer             38           54       24         22        16      23
## Wheat IPA              24           55       43         29        22      14
##               S_Smoked S_Foamy S_Sour S_Sweet S_Warming S_Vinous
## Brown Ale           38      27     19      44        26       12
## NY Lager            24      27     17      22         9        8
## Porse Bock          13      26     35      13         7        6
## Ravnsborg Red       28      16     24      20        12        5
## River Beer           7      30     39      12         3        5
## Wheat IPA           25      26     22      25         6        8
###############################################
## 3) Tabela de frequências relativas
###############################################
n_total <- sum(N)
P <- N / n_total; P
##                 S_Flowers      S_Beans S_Intense berries    S_Caramel
## Brown Ale     0.001120134 0.0151218146       0.003920470 0.0145617474
## NY Lager      0.012881546 0.0028003360       0.004760571 0.0044805377
## Porse Bock    0.007560907 0.0005600672       0.005880706 0.0019602352
## Ravnsborg Red 0.004760571 0.0070008401       0.004200504 0.0098011761
## River Beer    0.006160739 0.0033604032       0.004200504 0.0008401008
## Wheat IPA     0.012601512 0.0025203024       0.004760571 0.0025203024
##                    S_Nuts S_Savoury spices S_Dessert spices S_Regional spices
## Brown Ale     0.007280874      0.003640437      0.003640437       0.003640437
## NY Lager      0.002520302      0.006160739      0.005600672       0.007280874
## Porse Bock    0.003360403      0.001680202      0.004480538       0.007000840
## Ravnsborg Red 0.007000840      0.005320638      0.005320638       0.005600672
## River Beer    0.003920470      0.003920470      0.002240269       0.005600672
## Wheat IPA     0.002520302      0.007560907      0.006720806       0.004480538
##                   S_Herbs S_Citrus fruit   S_Berries     S_Fruit S_Dried fruit
## Brown Ale     0.005600672    0.002800336 0.001680202 0.003080370   0.005880706
## NY Lager      0.005880706    0.008401008 0.001400168 0.004200504   0.001680202
## Porse Bock    0.006720806    0.009521143 0.001400168 0.002240269   0.001680202
## Ravnsborg Red 0.006440773    0.003080370 0.001680202 0.003080370   0.003920470
## River Beer    0.003640437    0.008120975 0.001120134 0.005040605   0.001120134
## Wheat IPA     0.007280874    0.008401008 0.002520302 0.005880706   0.001680202
##                   S_Liquor   S_Bitter S_Sparkling S_Refreshing    S_Fruity
## Brown Ale     0.0072808737 0.01764212 0.005600672   0.00700084 0.006160739
## NY Lager      0.0028003360 0.01932232 0.004760571   0.01064128 0.012601512
## Porse Bock    0.0025203024 0.01876225 0.010921311   0.01568188 0.006160739
## Ravnsborg Red 0.0025203024 0.01988239 0.006720806   0.01428171 0.007280874
## River Beer    0.0030803696 0.01820218 0.010641277   0.01512181 0.006720806
## Wheat IPA     0.0005600672 0.01596192 0.006720806   0.01540185 0.012041445
##                S_Aromatic   S_Pungent     S_Still    S_Smoked     S_Foamy
## Brown Ale     0.015961915 0.005040605 0.005880706 0.010641277 0.007560907
## NY Lager      0.010361243 0.005600672 0.005040605 0.006720806 0.007560907
## Porse Bock    0.005600672 0.005600672 0.004760571 0.003640437 0.007280874
## Ravnsborg Red 0.014561747 0.004760571 0.006440773 0.007840941 0.004480538
## River Beer    0.006160739 0.004480538 0.006440773 0.001960235 0.008401008
## Wheat IPA     0.008120975 0.006160739 0.003920470 0.007000840 0.007280874
##                    S_Sour     S_Sweet    S_Warming    S_Vinous
## Brown Ale     0.005320638 0.012321479 0.0072808737 0.003360403
## NY Lager      0.004760571 0.006160739 0.0025203024 0.002240269
## Porse Bock    0.009801176 0.003640437 0.0019602352 0.001680202
## Ravnsborg Red 0.006720806 0.005600672 0.0033604032 0.001400168
## River Beer    0.010921311 0.003360403 0.0008401008 0.001400168
## Wheat IPA     0.006160739 0.007000840 0.0016802016 0.002240269
###############################################
## 4) Massas de linhas e colunas
###############################################
r <- rowSums(P)   # massas das linhas
c <- colSums(P)   # massas das colunas

Dr_inv <- diag(1/sqrt(r))
Dc_inv <- diag(1/sqrt(c))

###############################################
## 5) Matriz central da CA
##    S = Dr^{-1/2} (P - r c^T) Dc^{-1/2}
###############################################
S <- Dr_inv %*% (P - r %*% t(c)) %*% Dc_inv

###############################################
## 6) SVD
###############################################
sv <- svd(S)
U <- sv$u
Delta <- sv$d
V <- sv$v

###############################################
## 7) Autovalores e inércia
###############################################
eigenvalues <- Delta^2
total_inertia <- sum(eigenvalues)
prop_inertia <- eigenvalues / total_inertia
cum_inertia <- cumsum(prop_inertia)

###############################################
## 7.1) Gráfico de Cotovelo – Scree Plot (manual)
###############################################
par(mfrow=c(1,2))

# Barras
barplot(
  eigenvalues,
  main = "Scree Plot (Autovalores)",
  xlab = "Dimensão",
  ylab = "Autovalor"
)

# Linhas + pontos
plot(
  eigenvalues, type="b", pch=19,
  main="Scree Plot (Linha)",
  xlab="Dimensão", ylab="Autovalor"
)

par(mfrow=c(1,1))

###############################################
## 7.2) Gráfico da Inércia Acumulada
###############################################
plot(
  cum_inertia, type="b", pch=19,
  ylim=c(0,1),
  main="Inércia Acumulada",
  xlab="Dimensão",
  ylab="Proporção Acumulada"
)
abline(h=0.8, col="red", lty=2)  # linha de referência 80%

###############################################
## 8) Coordenadas fatoriais
###############################################
F <- Dr_inv %*% U %*% diag(Delta)   # linhas
G <- Dc_inv %*% V %*% diag(Delta)   # colunas

###############################################
## 9) Contribuições
###############################################
ctr_rows <- (r * F^2) / eigenvalues    # contribuições das linhas
ctr_cols <- (c * G^2) / eigenvalues    # contribuições das colunas

###############################################
## 10) cos² — qualidade da representação
###############################################
cos2_rows <- F^2 / rowSums(F^2)
cos2_cols <- G^2 / colSums(G^2)

###############################################
## 11) Teste qui-quadrado
###############################################
expected <- r %*% t(c)
chisq <- n_total * sum((P - expected)^2 / expected)

df <- (nrow(N) - 1) * (ncol(N) - 1)
p_value <- 1 - pchisq(chisq, df)

###############################################
## 12) Gráfico biplot simples
###############################################
plot(F[,1], F[,2],
     pch = 19, col = "blue",
     xlab = "Dim 1", ylab = "Dim 2",
     main = "CA - Biplot (Linhas e Colunas)",
     xlim = range(c(F[,1], G[,1])),
     ylim = range(c(F[,2], G[,2])))

text(F[,1], F[,2], labels = rownames(F), pos = 3, col = "blue")

points(G[,1], G[,2], pch = 17, col = "red")
text(G[,1], G[,2], labels = colnames(G), pos = 3, col = "red")

###############################################
## 12.1) Biplot via Factoextra com eixos invertidos
###############################################
res.ca <- CA(tabela, graph=FALSE)
res_inv <- res.ca

res_inv$row$coord <- -res.ca$row$coord
res_inv$col$coord <- -res.ca$col$coord

fviz_ca_biplot(
  res_inv,
  map = "symmetric",
  repel = TRUE,
  title = "Biplot Simétrico (Eixos Invertidos)"
)

###############################################
## 13) Exibir resultados numéricos
###############################################
cat("Autovalores:\n")
## Autovalores:
print(eigenvalues)
## [1] 1.041762e-01 2.836283e-02 8.534538e-03 6.206494e-03 3.985463e-03
## [6] 2.849614e-33
cat("\nProporção da inércia:\n")
## 
## Proporção da inércia:
print(prop_inertia)
## [1] 6.886976e-01 1.875036e-01 5.642090e-02 4.103046e-02 2.634746e-02
## [6] 1.883849e-32
cat("\nQui-quadrado:", chisq, "\n")
## 
## Qui-quadrado: 540.1692
cat("Graus de liberdade:", df, "\n")
## Graus de liberdade: 130
cat("p-valor:", p_value, "\n")
## p-valor: 0
###############################################
## 13) Exibir resultados
###############################################
cat("Autovalores:\n")
## Autovalores:
print(eigenvalues)
## [1] 1.041762e-01 2.836283e-02 8.534538e-03 6.206494e-03 3.985463e-03
## [6] 2.849614e-33
cat("\nProporção da inércia:\n")
## 
## Proporção da inércia:
print(prop_inertia)
## [1] 6.886976e-01 1.875036e-01 5.642090e-02 4.103046e-02 2.634746e-02
## [6] 1.883849e-32
cat("\nQui-quadrado:", chisq, "\n")
## 
## Qui-quadrado: 540.1692
cat("Graus de liberdade:", df, "\n")
## Graus de liberdade: 130
cat("p-valor:", p_value, "\n")
## p-valor: 0
# Desativar notação científica temporariamente
options(scipen = 999)

cat("Autovalores:\n")
## Autovalores:
print(format(eigenvalues, scientific = FALSE))
## [1] "0.104176211048453898344590129454445559531"
## [2] "0.028362825996984249860011217947430850472"
## [3] "0.008534538198544440804060862149071908789"
## [4] "0.006206494353275301273376030053441354539"
## [5] "0.003985462626266543344211168431456826511"
## [6] "0.000000000000000000000000000000002849614"
cat("\nProporção da inércia:\n")
## 
## Proporção da inércia:
print(format(prop_inertia, scientific = FALSE))
## [1] "0.68869761350862901405633920148829929531"
## [2] "0.18750356132071530068650133671326329932"
## [3] "0.05642090483596085004336373458500020206"
## [4] "0.04103045989422091782694579364942910615"
## [5] "0.02634746044047392432574383747123647481"
## [6] "0.00000000000000000000000000000001883849"
cat("\nQui-quadrado:", format(chisq, scientific = FALSE), "\n")
## 
## Qui-quadrado: 540.1692
cat("Graus de liberdade:", format(df, scientific = FALSE), "\n")
## Graus de liberdade: 130
cat("p-valor:", format(p_value, scientific = FALSE), "\n")
## p-valor: 0
cat("p-valor:", format(p_value, scientific = TRUE), "\n")
## p-valor: 0e+00
cat("p-valor:", signif(p_value, digits = 50), "\n")
## p-valor: 0
sprintf("p-valor: %.10e", p_value)
## [1] "p-valor: 0.0000000000e+00"
eigen_df <- as.data.frame(res.ca$eig)
colnames(eigen_df) <- c("Autovalor", "% da Variância", "% Acumulado")

kable(eigen_df, caption = "Autovalores e Inércia") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
Autovalores e Inércia
Autovalor % da Variância % Acumulado
dim 1 0.1041762 68.869761 68.86976
dim 2 0.0283628 18.750356 87.62012
dim 3 0.0085345 5.642091 93.26221
dim 4 0.0062065 4.103046 97.36525
dim 5 0.0039855 2.634746 100.00000 
library(factoextra)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# Dados dos autovalores
eig <- as.data.frame(res.ca$eig)
colnames(eig) <- c("Eigenvalue", "VariancePercent")
eig$CumVariance <- cumsum(eig$VariancePercent)
eig$Dim <- paste0("Dim", 1:nrow(eig))

# Gráfico 1 — Scree Plot (%)
g1 <- fviz_screeplot(
  res.ca,
  addlabels = TRUE,
  ylim = c(0, 100),
  main = "Scree Plot - Autovalores (%)"
)

# Gráfico 2 — Variância Acumulada
g2 <- ggplot(eig, aes(x = Dim, y = CumVariance)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line(aes(group = 1)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(CumVariance, 1), "%")),
            vjust = -0.6, size = 4) +
  ylim(0, 100) +
  labs(
    title = "Variância Acumulada",
    x = "Dimensão",
    y = "Variância Acumulada (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

# Junta lado a lado
g1 + g2
